name: @example/cloudflare-workers-mcp
description: Cloudflare Workers starter for SolvaPay MCP — single `createSolvaPayMcpFetch` call over the Workers runtime. Ships the same paywalled demo toolbox as `supabase-edge-mcp`; the only runtime difference is the HTTP entrypoint.

scripts.build: cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && cp dist/mcp-app.html src/assets/mcp-app.html
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm -w build:packages && pnpm build && node scripts/deploy.mjs --prod
